articles.title: Simple “gut reset” may stop weight gain after Ozempic or Wegovy - Science Daily
articles.description: A new minimally invasive procedure may help people keep weight off after stopping popular drugs like Ozempic and semaglutide—something most patients struggle with. In a clinical trial, those who underwent a technique called duodenal mucosal resurfacing regain…
articles.content: A minimally invasive outpatient procedure may help people avoid regaining weight after stopping popular medications like Ozempic and semaglutide, according to research being presented at Digestive Di… [+4903 chars]
